title: Second Opinion — advisory red-team candidate findings
description: The shape the LLM adversarial pass MUST return. Every finding is ADVISORY; the code layer will clamp it to SOFT/confidence<=0.5, drop it if it cites no verbatim draft span (or NO SOURCE), and drop it if it re-flags an already-settled slot. A human owns the verdict.

vector.description: Prefer #4 (conclusion overreach) and fuzzy #1 (verdicts/limits the deterministic layer could not parse).

location.description: Where in the draft (e.g. 'conclusion', 'results[2]'). Must NOT match an already_settled slot.

claim.description: A VERBATIM span quoted from draft_text — the statement you are challenging.

evidence.description: Why it is unsupported: cite a declared_source token, or state 'NO SOURCE' if no input backs it. Accusations with neither are dropped.

confidence.description: Advisory only; capped at 0.5 by the code layer regardless of what you put here.

suggested_fix.description: Optional. Never auto-applied — a human decides.
